questions.question: What does "gingerly" mean?
options: Carefully and cautiously, often because of pain or fear.
A short rest or nap, usually taken in the afternoon.
A loud and continuous burst of laughter.
Long poles that support a building above the ground.
questions.correct_answer: Carefully and cautiously, often because of pain or fear.
questions.explanation: "gingerly" means: Carefully and cautiously, often because of pain or fear.

questions.question: Fill in the blank: New vocabulary enhances ______ comprehension.
questions.explanation: The full sentence is: "New vocabulary enhances story comprehension."

questions.question: Which of the following is TRUE about this topic?
options: Inferences help understand unspoken details in a story.
Semi-colons link two closely related independent clauses.
questions.correct_answer: Semi-colons link two closely related independent clauses.
questions.explanation: Correct! "Semi-colons link two closely related independent clauses." is one of the key things to remember.
